description: Multi-turn: send message -> list -> mark read (covers `neomind message read` ack path; previously uncovered).

turns.user: Send a severity=info message: 'Daily inspection complete'.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind message send --severity info --message 'Daily inspection complete'` (or POST /api/messages), parses message id
Turn 3: Agent runs `neomind message read <id>` (or POST /api/messages/<id>/read)
expectations.overall: Turn 3 must reuse the message id from Turn 1/2
